summary: Iteration 6 - Enhanced Dashboard with Red Alert System: All major features tested and working. Backend API 95.7% success, Frontend 100% success. New Red Alert system for critical tickets, animated tactical radar, and auto-refresh functionality all operational.

minor_issues.impact: LLM response delay - expected behavior with AI integration

passed_tests: Captain P login (username: captain, password: engage)
Red Alert banner displays for critical tickets (WG Sterndamm WLAN)
ROTER ALARM shows critical ticket details correctly
BESTAETIGT button successfully dismisses red alert banner
Dashboard stats show 6 ARTIKEL, 8 STANDORTE, 5 OFFENE ANLIEGEN, ROT alarm status
Tactical radar canvas renders with animated sweep and location dots
STANDORT-STATUS LIVE panel shows locations with open tickets and ECHTZEIT indicator
Auto-refresh every 30 seconds working (confirmed by red alert reappearing)
LETZTE EINTRAEGE section displays recent articles
Star Trek quote panel with rotating quotes
Enterprise map navigation accessible via location clicks
All backend APIs operational (23/24 tests passed - 95.7%)
Critical ticket detection and Red Alert triggering functional
